entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop species Cajanus cajan being studied for heat stress response.

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: An environmental challenge that impacts plant growth, crop production, and overall productivity.

entities.name: BAG GENE FAMILY
entities.description: B-cell lymphoma-2 associated athanogene genes that interact with heat shock proteins and regulate chaperones during heat stress.

entities.name: HEAT SHOCK PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins that interact with the BAG gene family to manage stress responses.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE SCANNING
entities.description: A method used to identify all members of the BAG gene family within the pigeonpea genome.

entities.name: IN SILICO ANALYSIS
entities.description: Computational analysis used to determine chromosomal location, sub-cellular localization, and regulatory elements of genes.

entities.name: EXPRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to evaluate the expression levels of genes in contrasting genotypes under heat stress.

entities.name: CCBAG GENES
entities.description: The specific BAG genes identified in the pigeonpea genome.

entities.name: BAG6
entities.description: A specific BAG gene (Cc_02358) that exhibited lower expression in heat-tolerant genotypes.

entities.name: UPSTREAM SEQUENCE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to analyze promoter regions to identify potential involvement in multiple stresses.

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of determining the biological roles of genes in signaling pathways.

entities.name: BREEDING INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Precise breeding strategies aimed at producing heat-resilient crop varieties.

entities.name: HEAT RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and productivity under heat stress.

entities.name: SIGNALING PATHWAYS
entities.description: Biochemical pathways that coordinate gene expression in response to environmental stress.

entities.name: CO-CHAPERONES
entities.description: Proteins that assist chaperones in protein folding, a role performed by the BAG gene family.

entities.name: CHAPERONES
entities.description: Proteins that help other proteins fold correctly, which are regulated by the BAG gene family.
